station_address: No 3, R G Gadkari Chowk, opposite Kohinoor Mills, Dadar, Shivaji Park, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400031
text:
Thali & Main Course Favorites
🥗 Punjabi Thali

Includes dal, sabzi, paneer dish, roti/naan, rice, papad & sweet

Great value and consistency
Rating: 4.5/5

🧀 Paneer Butter Masala

Smooth tomato gravy, not overly sweet

Paneer is soft and fresh
Rating: 4.5/5

🫘 Dal Fry / Dal Tadka

Light, homestyle yet flavorful

Perfect with jeera rice or roti

Valet parking available but it's costly at lower parel as compared with other branches.

station_address: No 3, R G Gadkari Chowk, opposite Kohinoor Mills, Dadar, Shivaji Park, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400031
text:
I had a doubt regarding the amount of petrol filled in my car as my cars fuel tank capacity is mentioned as 45 litres, but 50 litres were filled. To clarify my doubt, the fuel pump attendant patiently did the fuel volume test (with a 5 litre vessel) to my satisfaction and even the owner personally came out and showed me the letter from a car manufacturer on how the fuel tank volume is more than what is mentioned on the specs to account for heat expansion. (I also personally verified this online)
I really appreciate the polite and professional attitude of the fuel pump attendants and the owner and their level of transparency. Will definitely be filling my vehicles from here when I'm in the area.
Also, they have speed petrol, which has become rare to find nowadays.

text: Petrol pump is good, but entry for cng cars is little much hectic. They have a drinking water machine too. But one should keep the timing in mind before coming, for petrol 7:30 AM to 12:30 PM and for cng 7:30 AM to 10:30 PM

station_address: No 3, R G Gadkari Chowk, opposite Kohinoor Mills, Dadar, Shivaji Park, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400031
text:
This petrol pump is located near Wadala Ram mandir and Dadar monorail station.
It has petrol, diesel and CNG filling station.free air services for tyres.also a Tyre punture wala is present beside the petrol pump.rest room are also present in petrol pump.you can also use online payment or offline payment for service.
